responsibility.title: Responsibility Terms
responsibility.subtitle: Important information about our responsibilities and commitments
responsibility.introduction: AKMLEVA acts as an intermediary between the client and tourism service providers. These terms define our responsibilities and limitations.

liability.title: Liability and Limitations
liability.intro: Our liability is limited by our role as intermediaries.
liability.scope: We act in the booking and organization of services provided by third parties.
exclusions: Delays or cancellations by airlines or carriers
Damage, loss, or misplacement of luggage under third-party responsibility
Force majeure events (natural disasters, political instability, pandemics)
Refusal of entry into countries due to lack of proper traveler documentation

client.title: Client Responsibilities
client.intro: The client is responsible for ensuring compliance with all travel requirements.
items: Possess valid travel documentation (Passport, Visas, ID Card)
Comply with health and vaccination requirements of destinations
Provide correct and complete information at the time of booking
Verify all issued travel documents and report errors immediately

company.title: Company Responsibilities
company.intro: We are committed to providing excellent and transparent service.
items: Provide clear and accurate information about contracted services
Provide customer assistance before, during, and after the trip
Manage bookings and payments securely and efficiently

insurance.title: Insurance and Guarantees
insurance.intro: Our clients' safety is a priority.
insurance.company: Our insurances are mediated by certified insurers regulated by ASF.

disputes.title: Dispute Resolution
disputes.intro: We prioritize amicable resolution of any disputes.
procedure: Initial contact with our customer support service
Recourse to Alternative Consumer Dispute Resolution Entities
disputes.jurisdiction: For legal matters, Portuguese law and the court of the company's headquarters apply.

error.title: Error loading terms
error.message: Unable to load terms and conditions. Please try again.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Get legal updates and important notifications
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.governed: These terms and conditions are governed by the laws of Portugal.
footer.questions: If you have any questions, please contact our legal team.
